overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit urban plaza with palm trees, proceeding along commercial sidewalks past the 'Eden Plaza' entrance, crossing a street with distinctive blue crosswalk markings, and continuing along a waterfront promenade with orange safety railings.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit plaza passing between palm tree planters and modern glass buildings

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the palm tree planter

entered.detail: large rectangular planter with mature palm tree in the plaza center
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and geometric patterns
large illuminated advertising screen on building facade
contemporary metal and concrete bench seating area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bright sunlit urban plaza featuring palm trees in geometric planters, surrounded by modern glass office buildings. Pedestrians stroll through the open space while one person sits on a bench to the left, and large digital billboards are visible on the distant buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital storefronts and Eden Plaza entrance

events.description: passing from open plaza into commercial walkway with prominent Eden Plaza entrance signage

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial sidewalk passing digital storefronts and the Eden Plaza entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting on bench outside the Eden Plaza entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading 'EDEN PLAZA' above building entrance with teal and gold coloring
building facade covered with large digital advertising screens showing animated content
futuristic covered waiting area with digital displays

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open plaza into a commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees on the left and digital storefronts on the right. The prominent 'Eden Plaza' entrance appears with its distinctive signage, while pedestrians walk in the same direction and digital billboards display animated advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with distinctive blue crosswalk markings

events.description: vintage green sedan drives through the intersection while character is crossing
finishing crossing the blue crosswalk and approaching the waterfront promenade area

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with distinctive blue and white striped crosswalk markings

notable_agents.action: green vintage-style sedan driving through the intersection perpendicular to the crosswalk

entered.detail: distinctive bright blue and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
low orange safety barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
elevated transport track or highway overpass spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a wide urban intersection featuring distinctive bright blue crosswalk markings. A vintage green sedan drives past in the middle of the crossing, while orange traffic barriers line the left side and an elevated highway structure spans the background. The scene transitions from commercial buildings to the waterfront area.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with orange safety railing overlooking canal

events.description: character slows and stops near a couple standing by the orange waterfront railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront promenade before slowing to a stop near a couple overlooking the water

notable_agents.action: couple standing close together looking out over the canal water
child in pink shirt walking along the promenade

entered.detail: bright orange safety railing running along the edge of the waterfront promenade
body of water visible beyond the orange railing with reflections of buildings
elevated monorail or transport track structure with supports spanning overhead
large floating holographic advertisement visible between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a waterfront promenade featuring a distinctive bright orange safety railing overlooking a canal. The area is partially shaded by building overhangs, with elevated transport tracks and holographic billboards visible in the distance. The character slows and stops near a couple standing by the railing, while other pedestrians stroll along the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit futuristic city center that gradually transitions from an open corporate plaza to a shaded waterfront promenade. It begins in a bright urban square surrounded by glass office buildings and palm trees in geometric planters, moving past strolling pedestrians and distant digital billboards. As the character advances, the open space narrows into a commercial sidewalk lined with animated storefronts and the prominent entrance to Eden Plaza. The scene then shifts across a wide intersection marked by bright blue crosswalks, where a vintage green sedan drives past beneath an elevated highway structure. Finally, the camera follows the character onto a waterfront walkway defined by a bright orange safety railing and holographic billboards, eventually slowing to a stop near a couple overlooking the canal.
